title: Country Population Time Series
description: Total population for any country by ISO code as a yearly time series from World Bank Open Data, no key. Returns country, year, and population. End to end pipeline auto indexing test endpoint for the wrap pipeline; also a genuinely useful macro series for AI agents sizing markets and demographics.
descriptionBazaar: Total population for any country by ISO code as a yearly time series from World Bank Open Data, no key: country, year, population. For AI agents sizing markets and demographics. Pipeline auto-index verification endpoint.
